name: Striped Shirt Ponytail Mirror Selfie
description: Platinum blonde woman with low ponytail taking mirror selfie, unbuttoned blue-and-white striped shirt draped open, pulling shirt wider with left hand, white louvered closet doors background, iPhone 16 Pro unretouched aesthetic
input_prompt: platinum blonde low ponytail mirror selfie unbuttoned striped shirt pulling open white closet doors iphone

subject.description: adult woman mid-20s with platinum blonde hair in low ponytail, taking mirror selfie while pulling unbuttoned striped shirt wider, calm confident expression with subtle sultry vibe

face.expression: calm confident with subtle sultry vibe
face.details: shape: soft feminine with defined jawline and high cheekbones; eyes: almond-shaped hazel-green with clean catchlights, looking slightly left checking phone screen in mirror; brows: full natural brows with clean arch, slightly darker than hair; nose: straight slim bridge with soft rounded tip; lips: natural full lips, nude-pink tone with light gloss, slightly parted

skin.texture: real skin texture with visible pores
skin.details: faint freckles across nose and cheeks, subtle warm cheek flush; rule: no smoothing

hair.style: long hair with soft curtain bangs and face-framing strands
hair.details: tie: low ponytail gathered behind shoulders, slightly loose with flyaways

body.details: build: athletic, gym-trained silhouette (toned shoulders, subtle abs, strong legs and glutes); proportions: natural realistic anatomy

subject.expression_mood: calm confident with subtle sultry vibe

clothing.type: oversized blue-and-white vertical striped button-down shirt
clothing.details: styling: unbuttoned and draped open wider at front, collar relaxed, no bra underneath; opening: shirt edges pulled farther apart to show deeper neckline; sleeves: pushed up with visible wrinkles and cuff buttons; fabric: cotton poplin with crisp stripe texture

accessories: thin gold chain necklace with small curved pendant
silver ring with dark red rectangular stone
short-to-medium almond nails with pale pink manicure

pose_action.posture: slight back arch with shoulders subtly rolled back to emphasize neckline
pose_action.gaze: eyes directed toward phone screen via mirror (side gaze)
pose_action.dynamic_elements: torso: upper body angled three-quarter to mirror, left shoulder slightly forward, chest turned subtly toward camera; head: head turned left, chin slightly forward and a touch down (jawline defined); phone_hand: hand: right hand holding phone, position: phone held near right cheek but shifted outward and slightly forward so full face stays visible, height: phone around eye-to-forehead height, grip: fingers spread along back, thumb on side edge (natural selfie grip), rule: phone must not cover eyes, nose, or lips; shirt_hand: hand: left hand, action: pinching shirt edge near lower chest/upper rib and gently pulling outward to widen opening, wrist_angle: wrist slightly flexed inward for soft curved hand line, fingers: relaxed fingers, no tension, natural finger spacing
pose_action.hands: right hand holding phone near right cheek, shifted outward and slightly forward so full face stays visible; phone around eye-to-forehead height; fingers spread along back with thumb on side edge; phone must not cover eyes, nose, or lips

background: white louvered closet doors with evenly spaced horizontal slats
small round door knob visible on lower right
environment.rules: no readable logos, keep closet slats straight (no warping), no duplicated fingers, natural anatomy
environment.atmosphere: intimate indoor mirror selfie, calm confident mood

camera_technical.look: unretouched smartphone photo, low HDR, subtle grain, minimal sharpening
camera_technical.shot_type: rear-camera mirror selfie (no portrait-mode cutout blur)
camera_technical.lens: camera: 1x main camera, focal_length: 24mm equivalent, distortion: controlled (no wide-face warp), straight closet slats
camera_technical.composition: framing: tight crop from top of head to mid-chest, phone on right side of frame, face fully visible in three-quarter profile, shirt opening clearly visible, tilt: slight handheld tilt (0-2 degrees), distance: close (about 40-80 cm to mirror)
camera_technical.focus: mode: face/eye priority AF, point: nearest eye, detail_rule: eyes, pores, hair strands, and shirt fabric texture sharp; background slightly softer but clear

exposure.highlight_rule: avoid blown highlights on cheekbones and white closet doors

realism_anchors: visible skin pores and faint freckles

gpt-image-1.5.prompt:
An indoor room with white louvered closet doors featuring evenly spaced horizontal slats and neutral off-white walls.

A woman in her mid-20s with platinum blonde long hair takes a mirror selfie. Her hair has soft curtain bangs and face-framing strands, gathered in a low ponytail behind her shoulders that is slightly loose with flyaways. She has a soft feminine face with defined jawline and high cheekbones, almond-shaped hazel-green eyes looking left toward the phone screen, and natural full lips with nude-pink gloss that are slightly parted.

Her skin has real texture with visible pores, faint freckles across her nose and cheeks, and a subtle warm flush. She has an athletic gym-trained build with toned shoulders.

She wears an oversized blue-and-white vertical striped button-down shirt that is unbuttoned and draped open, with sleeves pushed up showing wrinkles and cuff buttons. Her left hand pinches the shirt edge near her lower chest, gently pulling outward to widen the opening with relaxed fingers.

She wears large gold hoop earrings, a thin gold chain necklace with a small curved pendant, and rings including a silver one with a dark red rectangular stone. Her nails are short-to-medium almond with pale pink manicure.

She stands at a three-quarter angle to the mirror with her right hand holding the phone near her cheek, shifted outward so her face stays fully visible.

Soft indoor overhead vanity-style lighting with warm-neutral illumination creates gentle shadows under her jaw and along her collarbone.

Unretouched iPhone 16 Pro quality. No beauty filter. No skin smoothing. Realistic texture.
gpt-image-1.5.notes: Natural language paragraphs, explicit preservation constraints, no quality tags

seedream-4.5.prompt: A mid-20s woman with platinum blonde hair in a low ponytail with curtain bangs takes a mirror selfie in a room with white louvered closet doors. She has hazel-green eyes looking toward her phone screen, full lips with nude-pink gloss slightly parted, and real skin texture with visible pores and faint freckles. Her athletic build shows toned shoulders as she wears an oversized blue-and-white vertical striped button-down shirt, unbuttoned and draped open with sleeves pushed up. Her left hand pinches the shirt edge, pulling it outward to widen the opening. She wears gold hoop earrings, a chain necklace with pendant, and rings. Standing at a three-quarter angle, she holds her phone in her right hand. Soft indoor overhead lighting, warm-neutral tones, unretouched iPhone quality, 24mm lens, natural skin texture, not filtered or smoothed.
seedream-4.5.notes: Coherent natural language, subject first, concise photography terms, inline style negation

flux-kontext-max.prompt: A mid-20s woman with platinum blonde long hair in a low ponytail with soft curtain bangs takes a mirror selfie. She has almond-shaped hazel-green eyes looking toward her phone, natural full lips with nude-pink gloss slightly parted, and real skin texture with visible pores and faint freckles. Her athletic gym-trained build shows toned shoulders. She wears an oversized blue-and-white vertical striped button-down shirt, unbuttoned and draped open with the collar relaxed and sleeves pushed up. Her left hand pinches the shirt edge near her lower chest, gently pulling outward. She wears gold hoop earrings, a thin chain necklace with curved pendant, and rings. The background shows white louvered closet doors with horizontal slats and off-white walls. Soft indoor overhead vanity-style lighting, unretouched iPhone 16 Pro quality, 24mm equivalent lens.
flux-kontext-max.editing_prompt: Change the striped shirt from blue-and-white to pink-and-white while keeping the woman in the exact same mirror selfie pose with her left hand pulling the shirt open. Preserve her platinum blonde ponytail, facial features, jewelry, and the white louvered closet door background.
flux-kontext-max.notes: Natural language with preservation clauses for editing mode, 512 token limit

playbook_principles_applied: 1_hierarchical_specificity: Extremely detailed face description, precise hand actions, specific background elements
2_realism_anchors: 'visible pores', 'faint freckles', 'shirt fabric texture', 'louvered slats', 'ponytail flyaways'
3_technical_camera: 'iPhone 16 Pro', '24mm', 'eye-focus', 'face priority metering', specific ISO/WB ranges
4_negative_hygiene: prevents beauty filter, smoothing, portrait blur, warped slats, duplicated fingers
5_spatial_consistency: precise three-quarter angle, specific hand positions and actions
6_lighting_storytelling: 'soft overhead vanity-style' = intimate confident bedroom mood
7_pose_detail: explicit shirt-pulling action with finger relaxation and wrist angle
